'''Gebnerret Vibrion''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the planet [[Ghorman/Legends|Ghorman]] and [[Sern sector/Legends|Sern sector]] in the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]].

==Biography==
In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], he was later arrested and imprisoned by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in an interrogation center on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]]; he was eventually [[Mission to Selnesh|rescued]] by members of a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Commando/Legends|commando]] team led by [[Koris Haslam]]. In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Vibrion suffered from [[Zithrom's syndrome]] and required large doses of [[Clondex]] to survive.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|10|Do No Harm|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
